<!-- Thanks for the PR. Keep it tight. -->

## What this PR does

<!-- One paragraph. Why this change, not what files moved. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature (new tool, new option)
- [ ] Refactor (no behavior change)
- [ ] Docs / chore
- [ ] Performance / token-efficiency

## Checklist

- [ ] `uv run ruff check` passes
- [ ] `uv run ruff format --check` passes
- [ ] `uv run mypy src` passes
- [ ] `uv run pytest` passes
- [ ] Added or updated tests for the change
- [ ] Updated `CHANGELOG.md` under `## [Unreleased]`
- [ ] If a new tool: docstring follows the USE WHEN / DO NOT USE WHEN pattern
- [ ] If touching `client.py`: real Pexels endpoints still verified (manual smoke test)
